sources.population: Postpartum women and newborns during the first six weeks following childbirth.
sources.clinical_setting: DoH-licensed facility, outpatient, home-visit, and teleconsultation postnatal services in Abu Dhabi.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for Abu Dhabi postnatal follow-up during the first six weeks; partial for later postpartum care and settings outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_sections.heading: 1. Standard Scope and postnatal check schedule
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Abu Dhabi postnatal services and four checks through six weeks, with timing and mode adjusted for risk.

exact_sections.heading: 3.1 Core Components — maternal physical and emotional health, education, support, and continuity
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.

exact_sections.heading: Appendix 1 — medical risk indicators for mothers
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Lists thromboembolic symptoms, heavy bleeding, wound infection signs, fever, abdominal pain, wound discharge, severe headache, visual symptoms, and postpartum hypertensive complications.

exact_sections.heading: Appendices 2 and 3 — detailed maternal postnatal and home-visit checks
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.
